member.name: T:ScheduleInfo
member.summary:
A query that returns information about the current state of a scheduled transaction on a Hedera network.

See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:ScheduleInfo.#ctor(ScheduleId,AccountId,AccountId,Proto.SchedulableTransactionBody,KeyList,Key,TransactionId,System.String,DateTimeOffset,DateTimeOffset,DateTimeOffset,LedgerId,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Constructor.

member.name: M:ScheduleInfo.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a schedule info object from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:ScheduleInfo.FromProtobuf(Proto.ScheduleInfo)
member.summary: Create a schedule info object from a protobuf.

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.ScheduleId
member.summary: The ID of the schedule transaction

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.CreatorAccountId
member.summary: The Hedera account that created the schedule transaction in x.y.z format

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.PayerAccountId
member.summary: The Hedera account paying for the execution of the schedule transaction in x.y.z format

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.Signatories
member.summary: The signatories that have provided signatures so far for the schedule transaction

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.AdminKey
member.summary: The Key which is able to delete the schedule transaction if set

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.ScheduledTransactionId
member.summary: The scheduled transaction

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.Memo
member.summary: Publicly visible information about the Schedule entity, up to 100 bytes. No guarantee of uniqueness.

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.ExpirationTime
member.summary: The date and time the schedule transaction will expire

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.ExecutedAt
member.summary: The time the schedule transaction was executed. If the schedule transaction has not executed this field will be left null.

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.DeletedAt
member.summary: The consensus time the schedule transaction was deleted. If the schedule transaction was not deleted, this field will be left null.

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.TransactionBody
member.summary: The scheduled transaction (inner transaction).

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.LedgerId
member.summary: The ledger ID the response was returned from; please see HIP-198 for the network-specific IDs.

member.name: P:ScheduleInfo.WaitForExpiry
member.summary:
When set to true, the transaction will be evaluated for execution at expiration_time instead of when all required signatures are received. When set to false, the transaction will execute immediately after sufficient signatures are received to sign the contained transaction. During the initial ScheduleCreate transaction or via ScheduleSign transactions.
Note: this field is unused until Long Term Scheduled Transactions are enabled.

member.name: M:ScheduleInfo.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Create the protobuf.

member.name: M:ScheduleInfo.GetScheduledTransaction
member.summary: Extract the transaction.

member.name: M:ScheduleInfo.GetScheduledTransaction``1
member.summary: Extract the transaction.

member.name: M:ScheduleInfo.ToBytes
member.summary: Create the byte array.
